title: Slow Cooked Slovakian Mozzarella Casserole
description: A diabetic friendly Slovakian dish featuring mozzarella balls and nuka pickle, slow cooked to perfection. This casserole has a unique bitter and glassy jelly texture.
instructions: Preheat the slow cooker to 275 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large skillet, heat the olive oil over medium heat and cook the ground beef until browned.
Add the chopped onion and minced garlic to the skillet and cook until the onion is translucent.
Stir in the tomato paste, paprika, salt, and black pepper, and cook for 1 minute.
Add the sliced nuka pickle to the skillet and cook for an additional 2 minutes.
In the slow cooker, combine the cooked ground beef mixture, mozzarella balls, and any accumulated juices.
Cover the slow cooker and cook for 6 hours or overnight.
After 6 hours, remove the slow cooker from the heat and let it cool for 30 minutes.
Serve the casserole hot, garnished with chopped fresh parsley if desired.
